name: Spicy Tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tofu into cubes and drain on paper towels.
2. Heat a wok.
3. Add the tofu without oil and stir-fry until heated through, but not crisp.
4. Transfer the tofu to a mixing bowl.
5. Add all remaining ingredients except the assorted vegetables and lettuce.
6. Mix thoroughly.
7. Line a serving bowl with lettuce leaves and pour the sautéed mixture over them.
8. Serve alongside rice and assorted vegetables.
Heat uncooked rice over moderate heat until golden, stirring to prevent burning. Remove from heat, cool, and grind to a powder using a mortar and pestle.
+ Roast whole chilies in a dry wok until darkened. Be careful not to burn them. Cool, remove stems and seeds, then grind.
